items.title: Google DeepMind on X — AI manipulation research
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Google DeepMind and Google AI have been active on X (Twitter) in early 2026 with several major announcements. Key highlights include a new research partnership with Agile Robots to integrate Gemini foundation models into next-generation robotics hardware, and a separate partnership with Boston Dynamics to advance Gemini Robotics capabilities in their Atlas humanoid robots. Google AI also announced Genie 3, a general-purpose world model capable of generating dynamic, interactive 3D environments f

items.title: A new era of agentic commerce is here | Google Cloud Blog
items.author: cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Google Cloud has made several significant Gemini AI announcements in early 2026. Most notably, Gemini 3.1 Pro launched in preview on Vertex AI, Gemini Enterprise, and via the Gemini API in Google AI Studio. This model represents a step forward in core reasoning capabilities, building on the Gemini 3 series, and is also accessible through Android Studio, Google Antigravity, and Gemini CLI. Alongside this, the Gemini Live API — powered by the Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio model — reached general a

items.title: Building multi-agent systems | Genkit — Firebase
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet:
Genkit is an open-source AI development framework built and used in production by Google, supporting JavaScript/TypeScript (stable), Go (beta), and Python (alpha). It provides a code-centric approach to building AI-powered applications with a unified API for text generation, structured output, streaming, tool calling, and agentic workflows. The framework includes a CLI, local developer UI, observability tooling, and evaluation support to streamline the full AI development lifecycle.

Genkit's ag

items.title: Firebase Studio lets you build full-stack AI apps with Gemini | Google Cloud Blog
items.author: cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Firebase Studio is Google's agentic, cloud-based development environment that enables developers to build full-stack AI-powered applications directly in the browser. It combines a Code OSS-based IDE with an AI-driven App Prototyping agent powered by Gemini 2.5 Pro, allowing both code-first and no-code development workflows. Developers can describe an app idea in natural language, and the agent generates a blueprint, code, and live preview — making it particularly accessible for rapid prototyping

items.title: Build Gen AI Features with Genkit RAG | Firebase Codelabs
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet:
Firebase Genkit is Google's open-source AI development framework available for JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python. The official documentation covers a broad range of topics including getting started guides for each language, generating content with AI models (supporting Google Gemini, GPT, Claude, and others), structured outputs, tool calling, and streaming. The framework provides a unified API layer and a built-in Developer UI for local testing and flow inspection.

The documentation include

items.title: Antigravity update 1.20.3 2026/3/5 - Google Antigravity Forum
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Google Antigravity is Google's agentic development platform that has been tightly integrated with Google AI Studio as of early 2026. The platform uses Gemini 3's advanced reasoning and agentic coding capabilities to transform AI assistance into an active development partner — agents can autonomously plan and execute complex, end-to-end software tasks while validating their own code, with direct access to the editor, terminal, and browser. Google AI Studio now includes a full-stack 'vibe coding'
